sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13508" key="a)poproqe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποπροθέω</orth>, <sense id="n13508.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">run away from,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.679</biblScope> </bibl> (better divisim).</sense> </entryFree>
